title: E-commerce Fulfillment Warehouse
description: A fast-growing e-commerce company needed a flexible storage solution for 5,000+ SKUs with frequent daily picking operations. Heavy-duty selective racking provided 100% access to every pallet position, enabling efficient order fulfillment.

title: Frozen Food Cold Storage
description: A food distributor needed high-density cold storage with strict FIFO rotation for perishable goods. Radio Shuttle system maximized storage density in expensive cold space while maintaining automated FIFO operation.
highlights: FIFO automation for food safety compliance

title: Automotive Parts Warehouse
description: An auto parts manufacturer stored large volumes of uniform components with low SKU variety. Drive-in racking achieved maximum density at minimum cost, with LIFO rotation perfectly matching their production flow.
highlights: 4,800 pallet positions at lowest cost per pallet
